untranslatable_reason: This strategy requires rolling OLS regression residuals and ADF stationarity tests on cointegrated pairs, which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The core signals depend on: (1) calculating residuals from a 60-bar rolling OLS regression between two cointegrated assets, (2) computing z-scores of those residuals, (3) confirming mean reversion via ADF test (p<0.05), and (4) trading when z-score exceeds ±2.0. None of these derived metrics (residuals, rolling regression coefficients, z-scores on residuals, ADF p-values) exist in the allowed indicators. This requires a multi-asset statistical arbitrage framework not expressible with single-asset OHLCV-based indicators.
translation_notes: Signal is a sophisticated pairs trading strategy using cointegration and OLS regression. The allowed indicator set only supports single-asset technical analysis. Would require: (a) residual_zscore indicator, (b) adf_pvalue indicator, (c) multi-asset regression framework. Recommend implementing as custom strategy module outside the standard backtest engine.
